sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: NA / Not Available
under these circumstances something either is so or becomes so

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Probably from G142 (through the idea of drawing a conclusion); a particle denoting an inference more or less decisive (as follows): - haply, (what) manner (of man), no doubt, perhaps, so be, then, therefore, truly, wherefore. Often used in connection with other particles, especially G1065 or G3767 (after) or G1487 (before). Compare also G687.
